mapper.select:
SELECT a.user_id as matchUserId, a.nick_name as matchUserName, b.count as companyNumber, IFNULL(c.count,0) as tradeNumber , round(IFNULL(c.totalTradeAmount,0),2) totalTradeAmount, round(IFNULL(d.overdueNumber,0),2) overdueNumber, round(IFNULL(d.totalOverdueAmount,0),2) totalOverdueAmount, round(IFNULL( d.breach_days, 0)/ IFNULL( d.overdueNumber, 1),2) as averageOverdueDay, round(IFNULL(d.overdueNumber, 0)/ IFNULL(c.count , 1),2) as overdueRate, round(IFNULL(e.count, 0)/ IFNULL(c.count , 1),2) as defaultRate , round(IFNULL(d.breach_amount,0),2) as totalInterestAmount, round(IFNULL(d.receive_breach_amount,0),2) as totalReceiveInterestAmount from `sptauth_pd`.sys_user a left join ( select count(a.id) count, a.match_user_id from t_bs_company a where a.enable_flg = true GROUP by a.match_user_id) b on a.user_id = b.match_user_id left join ( select a.match_user_id, count(a.id) count, sum(a.total_amount) totalTradeAmount from t_ctr_contract a where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP by a.match_user_id ) c on c.match_user_id = a.user_id left join ( select a.match_user_id, count(a.id) overdueNumber, sum(a.total_amount) totalOverdueAmount, sum(a.breach_days) breach_days, sum(a.breach_amount) breach_amount, sum(a.receive_breach_amount) receive_breach_amount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement tbs on a.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.breach_days > 0 and tbs.budget_status != '3'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP by a.match_user_id ) d on d.match_user_id = a.user_id left join ( select tcc.match_user_id, count(tbs.id) count from t_ctr_contract tcc left join t_budget_settlement tbs on tcc.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where tcc.contract_type = 'S' and tcc.status = 'D' and tbs.budget_status = '3'
AND DATE_FORMAT(tcc.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(tcc.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP by tcc.match_user_id ) e on e.match_user_id = a.user_id where a.status = '0' and a.enterprise_id = 44
and a.user_id = #{matchUserId}
and a.user_id in
#{matchUserIds[${index}]}

select round(sum(a.companyNumber) ,2) totalCompanyNumber, round(sum(a.tradeNumber) ,2) totalTradeNumber, round(sum(a.totalTradeAmount) ,2) totalTotalTradeAmount, round(sum(a.overdueNumber) ,2) totalOverdueNumber, round(sum(a.totalOverdueAmount) ,2) totalTotalOverdueAmount, round(sum(breachDays) / sum(a.overdueNumber),2) aveAverageOverdueDay, round(sum(a.overdueNumber) / sum(a.tradeNumber),2) aveOverdueRate, round(sum(defaultCount) / sum(a.tradeNumber),2) aveDefaultRate, round(sum(totalInterestAmount) ,2) totalTotalInterestAmount, round(sum(totalReceiveInterestAmount) ,2) totalTotalReceiveInterestAmount from ( SELECT b.count as companyNumber, IFNULL(c.count, 0) as tradeNumber, IFNULL(c.totalTradeAmount, 0) totalTradeAmount, IFNULL(d.overdueNumber, 0) overdueNumber, IFNULL(d.totalOverdueAmount, 0) totalOverdueAmount, d.breach_days as breachDays, e.count as defaultCount, IFNULL(d.breach_amount, 0) as totalInterestAmount, IFNULL(d.receive_breach_amount, 0) as totalReceiveInterestAmount from `sptauth_pd`.sys_user a left join ( select count(a.id) count, a.match_user_id from t_bs_company a where a.enable_flg = true GROUP by a.match_user_id) b on a.user_id = b.match_user_id left join ( select a.match_user_id, count(a.id) count, sum(a.total_amount) totalTradeAmount from t_ctr_contract a where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP by a.match_user_id) c on c.match_user_id = a.user_id left join ( select a.match_user_id, count(a.id) overdueNumber, sum(a.total_amount) totalOverdueAmount, sum(a.breach_days) breach_days, sum(a.breach_amount) breach_amount, sum(a.receive_breach_amount) receive_breach_amount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement tbs on a.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.breach_days > 0 and tbs.budget_status != '3'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP by a.match_user_id) d on d.match_user_id = a.user_id left join ( select tcc.match_user_id, count(tbs.id) count from t_ctr_contract tcc left join t_budget_settlement tbs on tcc.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where tcc.contract_type = 'S' and tcc.status = 'D' and tbs.budget_status = '3'
AND DATE_FORMAT(tcc.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(tcc.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP by tcc.match_user_id) e on e.match_user_id = a.user_id where a.status = '0' and a.enterprise_id = 44
and a.user_id = #{matchUserId}
and a.user_id in
#{matchUserIds[${index}]}
) a
